html: Does this even still matter? No good behaviour in the world can restore trust in claude code and in fact all of Anthropics tooling, apps and harness teams except the core model research which still produces great models but seemingly losing ground to z and openAI. The GLM 5.2 hype and the limited impact of the fable lock down should be clear signals that models have no moat and frontier labs will do anything in their power to lock users into their toxic ecosystem of tools and taking context hostage.
